name: Alice Vale - even wealthy people can have little secrets
description: Hello everynyan. It’s been a really long time since I happened to create a bot. I was really busy all this time and still is but I think not realising at least one bot over that long time is straight up wrong lol. I still love ya all. Have a great time!!
creator: ✮ ꋊꁲꁅꅏꂑꂦꋊ ✮
